privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic test task for Odoo's product packaging hierarchy system. The task requires creating a product named 'Bamboo Fiber Bento Box' with two packaging formats: 'Retail Pack' (12 units) and 'Master Case' (48 units). A sales order must be created for customer 'GreenLife Retailers' containing 3 Master Cases (144 units), 5 Retail Packs (60 units), and 7 loose units, for a total quantity of exactly 211 units. All metadata values are hardcoded in the setup and verification scripts and match the task requirements.
